name: Carrot Pie
recipeInstructions:
Filling and Assembly: Preheat oven to 450 degrees. In a bowl, mix all filling ingredients together at medium speed of an electric mixer until well combined. Pour mixture into the pie shell and bake at 450 degrees for 5 minutes. Reduce heat to 325 degrees and continue baking for 45 minutes, or until set. Allow to cool about 10 minutes before serving.
Pie Crust: In a bowl, combine flour and salt. Add vegetable shortening and cut in until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Gradually add ice water, one tablespoon at a time, mixing quickly with a fork after each addition. Form dough into two equal portions, shape into smooth balls, and roll out one portion on a lightly floured surface. Place rolled dough into a 9-inch pie plate, trimming and crimping edges.
